title: Helping Children with Autism with Difficult Speaking through 7 Tinctures
description: Passiflora incarnata tinctures have been traditionally used to help with difficult speaking, also known as stuttering or stammering. The tincture contains flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides, which are responsible for its therapeutic effects. These compounds have a calming effect on the nervous system, which can help to reduce anxiety and stress that often accompany difficult speaking.
